sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_hashes (input_string String, hash32 UInt32, hash64 UInt64);
INSERT INTO test_hashes (input_string, hash32, hash64) VALUES ('Hello, world!', xxHash32('Hello, world!'), xxHash64('Hello, world!'));
UPDATE test_hashes SET hash32 = xxHash32(input_string), hash64 = xxHash64(input_string) WHERE input_string LIKE 'Hello%';
SELECT input_string, hash32, hash64 FROM test_hashes WHERE hash32 = xxHash32('Sample string');
SELECT DISTINCT hash64 FROM test_hashes WHERE hash32 <> xxHash32('Another sample');
